---
title: "Developers"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Developers

Developer-facing notes for building docs, validating package state, and keeping Quarto/pkgdown outputs consistent.

[Open pkgdown](pkgdown/index.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Open API reference](pkgdown/reference/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.cardx}
### Build docs
Use the project build script to render Quarto and pkgdown into `docs/`.

```r
source("tools/build_docs.R")
build_docs()
```
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Package checks
Run standard package checks before publishing docs.

```r
devtools::check()
```

or

```sh
R CMD check .
```
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Test focus
Use targeted tests under `tests/testthat` for fast iteration, then full checks for release readiness.

- `tests/testthat/test-vignette-coverage.R`
- `tests/testthat/test-smoke-core-workflows.R`
:::

:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Documentation maintenance

- Keep Quarto map pages concise and conceptual.
- Keep full function and article details in pkgdown.
- If exported R APIs change, regenerate roxygen docs and refresh relevant articles.
- Keep links branch-aware (`master` currently) until repository default branch changes.

## Where to go next

1. [Coverage](coverage.html) for test/coverage entry points.
2. [News](news.html) for documentation-level updates.
3. [Roadmap](roadmap.html) for workflow progression.

:::
:::
